title: Origin Realms - Quality of Life
body:
Origin Realms is defiantly one of the best survival servers! That is known by its community! Though, it is a server with plugins only, making some features not possible... That is where this modpack comes in!

**BASIC INFO:**
This modpack adds many mods to make your experience better! From Origins Enhanced, to resource packs, you can enhance your Origin Realms experience!  

The modpack is made specifically to improve your Origin Realms experience! If you've never heard of it, or played it, try it at play.originrealms.com! (not a sponsor)

**RESOURCE PACKS:** (Server Pack Unlocker will allow you to place any of these above the server's Resource Pack)

- Origin Realms - Emissive by Nebby_56 (allows for Origin Realms texture to glow with shaders when needed - REQUIRES LabPBR)
- Origin Realms GUI Revamp by gousisme

- OR-Tweaks by Bold_Muddy

(not sponsered) To support OR-Tweaks or make your own customizations, click here! > [OR Tweaks Page](https://ortweaks.pages.dev/)

**SHADERS:**
- Complimentary Shaders - Reimagined & Unbound by EmitGT

- BSL by capttatsu

- Super Duper Vanilla Shaders by eldeston


As Always, you can add your own Resource Packs and/or shaders if you would like! 

**~REPORT CRASHES TO MY DISCORD: gonzostudioz ~**


### **Not in any way affiliated with Origin Realms nor OR-Tweaks**
